headline: Street Calls of the Week
summary: Monday - US Markets Closed for Memorial Day Cognex Corp. What happened? On Tuesday, JPMorgan upgraded Cognex Corporation (NASDAQ:CGNX) to Overweight with $75 price target. *TLDR: JPMorgan: Buy Cognex for AI growth. What’s the full story? JPMorgan is upgrading Cognex to Overweight, bumping the price target to $75. Why?
